mechanism_narrative: Near-zero federal funds rates eliminate short-term discount rate pressure on equity valuations, generating positive forward returns as liquidity flows into risk assets.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS < 0.25%

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 9.0%, corporate earnings expectations deteriorate sharply, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter as consumer spending collapses.
failure_condition: 60d forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances despite UNRATE > 9.0%

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts signal synchronized consumer and capital expenditure recovery, driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive MoM changes in RSAFS and HOUST fail to produce positive 20d returns in >50% of cases

mechanism_narrative: In a post-liquidity shock environment, a monthly industrial production index above 95.0 confirms manufacturing capacity utilization is stabilizing, triggering short-term positive equity momentum.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns are negative in >65% of observations when INDPRO > 95.0 during recovery phases

mechanism_narrative: The combination of a federal funds rate below 0.5% and a declining unemployment rate over three months creates a liquidity-driven earnings rebound, yielding positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: 60d forward returns are negative in >55% of instances when both conditions are met

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth above zero indicates positive aggregate demand, which directly supports corporate revenue forecasts and generates positive monthly S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth coincides with negative 20d forward returns in >60% of observations

mechanism_narrative: A monthly payroll employment increase exceeding 100,000 signals labor market stabilization, reducing recession risk premiums and producing positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns are negative in >70% of observations following payroll gains > 100k

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production alongside CPI inflation below 2.0% indicates supply-side recovery without triggering monetary tightening, resulting in positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns are negative in >55% of cases when INDPRO rises and CPIAUCSL < 2.0%
